original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: 2024 AHA/ACC Perioperative CV Management Guideline: Key Points
original_registry_entry.version: Official ACC key-points summary of the 2024 multisociety guideline
original_registry_entry.population: Adults undergoing noncardiac surgery with cardiovascular disease, cardiovascular risk factors, or symptoms concerning for cardiovascular disease.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Preoperative cardiovascular assessment and perioperative planning for noncardiac surgery.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for a stepwise clinician-led cardiovascular risk assessment, selective testing, team-based review, and anticoagulation risk context. It does not support automatic risk scores, tests, medicine changes, bridging, or doses, and UAE pathways remain local.

exact_sections.heading: Key points 1-4 - stepwise cardiovascular assessment, selective testing, and team care
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting clinician-led cardiovascular disease and risk-factor review, use of an already completed validated risk assessment, selective testing decisions, and team-based discussion.

exact_sections.heading: Key point 6 - therapeutic anticoagulation and individualized thrombotic or bleeding risk
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting anticoagulant use and clinician-assessed thrombotic and bleeding risk context without mapping hold, continue, bridge, medicine, or dose instructions.

title: 2024 AHA/ACC Perioperative CV Management Guideline: Key Points
population: Adults undergoing noncardiac surgery with cardiovascular disease, cardiovascular risk factors, or symptoms concerning for cardiovascular disease.
intended_setting: Preoperative cardiovascular assessment and perioperative planning for noncardiac surgery.
